title: Update your personal information with the CRA - Canada.ca
content:
## Update your personal information with the CRA
Inform the Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) of changes to your personal information.
Keeping your information up to date ensures you continue to receive the benefits and payments you are entitled to. It also allows us to contact you if necessary, for example if there are security or identity theft issues with your account.

## Services and information
Update your home or mailing address after you have moved

### Change your phone number
Add or change a phone number for your contact information or for multi-factor authentication (MFA)

### Change your email address
Change your current email address

### Change your direct deposit
Sign up for or change your direct deposit information with the CRA

### Change your marital status
Find out when and how to notify us about changes to your marital status as they may affect your benefit and credit payment amounts
Inform us of a change to either your first or last name, or both names

### Change your language of correspondence
Update your preferred language of correspondence between English and French

### Change your Correspondence preference online
Update your Correspondence preferences and view your mail online in My Account

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
